# Ascension Inflow Control Room v21 Report

Status: implemented.

New public route:

```text
/ascension-inflow-control.html
```

New public data contract:

```text
/ascension-inflow-control-demo.json
```

Purpose: demonstrate the GoalOS/AGI ALPHA open-system control idea. Visitors can tune compute, data, tasks, incentives, feedback, governance, and tools; then observe verified work, risk, proof debt, productive entropy, regime diagnosis, Chronicle trace, and a downloadable public-safe Evidence Docket.

Public-safety posture: no account, no form tag, no analytics, no cookies, no localStorage, no sessionStorage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

Verification markers:

- Page exists.
- CSS and JavaScript assets exist.
- Demo data contract exists.
- Schema exists.
- Public safety boundaries are present.
- JavaScript contains no fetch, XMLHttpRequest, wallet, localStorage, sessionStorage, or transaction primitive.
- Build emits the route and JSON contract.
